items.title: Calculus: Early Transcendentals (Stewart)
items.author: James Stewart
items.note: Standard undergraduate treatment of partial derivatives, tangent planes and the chain rule in several variables.

items.title: SymPy diff documentation
items.author: SymPy Development Team
items.note: Reference for symbolic partial differentiation used to verify hand calculations.

items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Chapter on calculus and automatic differentiation connects partial derivatives to gradients and backpropagation.
